PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Aug-23-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that there is no appearance, that this is a spousal property petition in which the examiner's notes raised a question regarding standing and venue and took the Spousal Property petition off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)
